title: theme — retention windows
description: Themes are retained while active + last-N activations for rollback (N=5 default, N=20 Enterprise via theme_rollback_extended). Platform presets retained indefinitely; tenant custom presets retained while their tenant is active. Overrides co-terminous with their parent theme. TenantErased cascade deletes everything.
compliance_regimes_referenced: gdpr Art. 5 (storage limitation) + Art. 17 (erasure cascades on TenantErased)
soc2 CC8.1 (change management via activation audit trail — rollback capability retained per policy)

purge.trigger: Theme is deactivated (is_active flips true → false) AND newer active theme exists in same (tenant_id, mode)
purge.action: Retained for rollback per the last-N policy below.

hot.description: Last-5 deactivated Theme rows per (tenant_id, mode) retained for rollback. Bumps to 20 when the tenant has the theme_rollback_extended entitlement.

purge.action: Hard delete rows beyond the last-N cap. Rollback UI only offers themes that survive this pass.
Refused while any active tenant Theme references the preset.
Hard delete via cascade FK. PurgeThemeDataForErasedTenant writes the audit trail.
Cascade delete via FK. Explicit DELETE via /theme-token-overrides/{override} is allowed at any time — falls through to preset default.
PurgeUserThemePreferenceForErasedUser listener writes the compliance trail; row cascades via user_id FK.

cross_reference: compliance::RetentionRun is written per purge pass for auditability.
The theme_rollback_extended entitlement lifts the cap from 5 to 20.
